title: Columns & Bases
summary: Load-bearing and decorative columns turned to spec, with matching bases and capitals.

title: Headers & Sills
summary: Precision-cut lintels and sills that carry load while keeping a clean sightline.

title: Fountains
summary: Courtyard and garden fountains carved to order, plumbed and ready for installation.

title: Pool Coping & Pavers
summary: Slip-resistant coping and paver sets cut to your pool's exact radius and edge detail.

title: Hardscaping
summary: Patios, steps, and retaining walls built from stone that ages the way poured concrete never will.

title: Kitchens & Range Hoods
summary: Carved stone range hoods and counter surrounds sized to fit your existing cabinetry.

title: Hand-Carved Fabrication
summary: Custom carving from a drawing, a photo, or a piece you bring in — our cantera specialty.

title: Stone ID & Restoration
summary: We identify aging or mismatched stone and cut replacement pieces that actually match.

title: Installation & Transport
summary: In-house rigging and delivery crews, because stone this heavy can't be handed off twice.
